# Xgboost Support Coverage

Tracking exhaustive coverage of the `xgboost` python package API.

## Detailed API

| Object Name                                                    | Type     | Signature                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| -------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `Booster`                                                      | Class    | `(params: Optional[BoosterParam], cache: Optional[Sequence[DMatrix]], model_file: Optional[Union[Booster, bytearray, os.PathLike, str]])`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `DMatrix`                                                      | Class    | `(data: DataType, label: Optional[ArrayLike], weight: Optional[ArrayLike], base_margin: Optional[ArrayLike], missing: Optional[float], silent: bool, feature_names: Optional[FeatureNames], feature_types: Optional[Union[FeatureTypes, Categories]], nthread: Optional[int], group: Optional[ArrayLike], qid: Optional[ArrayLike], label_lower_bound: Optional[ArrayLike], label_upper_bound: Optional[ArrayLike], feature_weights: Optional[ArrayLike], enable_categorical: bool, data_split_mode: DataSplitMode)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `DataIter`                                                     | Class    | `(cache_prefix: Optional[str], release_data: bool, on_host: bool, min_cache_page_bytes: Optional[int])`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `ExtMemQuantileDMatrix`                                        | Class    | `(data: DataIter, missing: Optional[float], nthread: Optional[int], max_bin: Optional[int], ref: Optional[DMatrix], enable_categorical: bool, max_quantile_batches: Optional[int], cache_host_ratio: Optional[float])`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `QuantileDMatrix`                                              | Class    | `(data: DataType, label: Optional[ArrayLike], weight: Optional[ArrayLike], base_margin: Optional[ArrayLike], missing: Optional[float], silent: bool, feature_names: Optional[FeatureNames], feature_types: Optional[FeatureTypes], nthread: Optional[int], max_bin: Optional[int], ref: Optional[DMatrix], group: Optional[ArrayLike], qid: Optional[ArrayLike], label_lower_bound: Optional[ArrayLike], label_upper_bound: Optional[ArrayLike], feature_weights: Optional[ArrayLike], enable_categorical: bool, max_quantile_batches: Optional[int], data_split_mode: DataSplitMode)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `RabitTracker`                                                 | Class    | `(n_workers: int, host_ip: Optional[str], port: int, sortby: str, timeout: int)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `XGBClassifier`                                                | Class    | `(objective: SklObjective, kwargs: Any)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `XGBModel`                                                     | Class    | `(max_depth: Optional[int], max_leaves: Optional[int], max_bin: Optional[int], grow_policy: Optional[str], learning_rate: Optional[float], n_estimators: Optional[int], verbosity: Optional[int], objective: SklObjective, booster: Optional[str], tree_method: Optional[str], n_jobs: Optional[int], gamma: Optional[float], min_child_weight: Optional[float], max_delta_step: Optional[float], subsample: Optional[float], sampling_method: Optional[str], colsample_bytree: Optional[float], colsample_bylevel: Optional[float], colsample_bynode: Optional[float], reg_alpha: Optional[float], reg_lambda: Optional[float], scale_pos_weight: Optional[float], base_score: Optional[Union[float, List[float]]], random_state: Optional[Union[np.random.RandomState, np.random.Generator, int]], missing: float, num_parallel_tree: Optional[int], monotone_constraints: Optional[Union[Dict[str, int], str]], interaction_constraints: Optional[Union[str, Sequence[Sequence[str]]]], importance_type: Optional[str], device: Optional[str], validate_parameters: Optional[bool], enable_categorical: bool, feature_types: Optional[FeatureTypes], feature_weights: Optional[ArrayLike], max_cat_to_onehot: Optional[int], max_cat_threshold: Optional[int], multi_strategy: Optional[str], eval_metric: Optional[Union[str, List[Union[str, Callable]], Callable]], early_stopping_rounds: Optional[int], callbacks: Optional[List[TrainingCallback]], kwargs: Any)` |
